sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the player's new position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] >= 20:
        print(f"Player: pixels={n['pixels']}")
        print(f"Boundary: {n['boundary']}")
        rows = sorted(set([p[0] for p in n['boundary']]))
        cols = sorted(set([p[1] for p in n['boundary']]))
        print(f"Row range: {rows[0]}-{rows[-1]}, Col range: {cols[0]}-{cols[-1]}")
        break

# Check red path
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        print(f"\nRed path: pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
